UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user account and their personal information within the DankDrops application. This entity does not store sensitive authentication data like passwords, relying on an external authentication system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for communication and potentially as a login identifier.

phoneNumber.description: The contact phone number for the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the user profile was updated.

Address.title: Address
Address.description: Represents a physical address associated with a user, used for shipping or billing purposes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Address entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile this address belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Address)

street2.description: The secondary street address line (e.g., apartment, suite, unit number).

stateProvince.description: The state or province of the address.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the address.

Brand.title: Brand
Brand.description: Represents a brand associated with products in the DankDrops catalog.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Brand entity.

description.description: A brief description of the brand.

logoUrl.description: URL to the brand's logo image.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a category used to organize and filter products in the DankDrops catalog.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

description.description: A brief description of the category.

parentCategoryId.description: Reference to a parent category for hierarchical categorization. (Relationship: Category 1:N Category - self-referencing)

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product available for sale in the DankDrops catalog.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

description.description: A comprehensive description of the product, including features and materials.

brandId.description: Reference to the Brand of this product. (Relationship: Brand 1:N Product)

categoryIds.description: References to the categories this product belongs to. (Relationship: Category N:N Product)

mainImageUrl.description: URL to the primary image for the product, displayed prominently.

additionalImageUrls.description: An array of URLs for additional high-resolution images of the product.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the product was added to the catalog.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the product details were updated.

ProductVariant.title: ProductVariant
ProductVariant.description: Represents a specific variation of a product, such as a particular size and color combination, with its own price and inventory.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductVariant entity.

productId.description: Reference to the parent Product this variant belongs to. (Relationship: Product 1:N ProductVariant)

size.description: The size of this product variant (e.g., 'S', 'M', 'L', 'XL', 'One Size').

color.description: The color of this product variant (e.g., 'Black', 'Deep Violet', 'Bright Blue').

sku.description: A unique Stock Keeping Unit for this specific product variant.

price.description: The price of this specific product variant.

inventoryQuantity.description: The current quantity of this product variant available in stock.

variantImageUrl.description: Optional URL to an image specifically for this variant (e.g., showing the color). Falls back to product images if not provided.

Cart.title: Cart
Cart.description: Represents a user's shopping cart, holding products selected for potential purchase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Cart entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this cart. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Cart)

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the cart was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the cart contents were updated.

CartItem.title: CartItem
CartItem.description: Represents a single product variant and its quantity within a user's shopping cart.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CartItem entity.

cartId.description: Reference to the Cart this item belongs to. (Relationship: Cart 1:N CartItem)

productVariantId.description: Reference to the specific ProductVariant added to the cart. (Relationship: ProductVariant 1:N CartItem)

quantity.description: The number of units of the product variant in the cart.

priceAtAddition.description: The price of the product variant when it was added to the cart, for historical accuracy.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a completed or in-progress purchase made by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who placed the order. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: Timestamp indicating when the order was placed.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order, including shipping and taxes.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'processing', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled').

shippingAddressId.description: Reference to the Address used for shipping this order. (Relationship: Address 1:N Order - shipping)

billingAddressId.description: Reference to the Address used for billing this order. (Relationship: Address 1:N Order - billing)

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single product variant and its quantity included in a specific order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productVariantId.description: Reference to the specific ProductVariant purchased in this order. (Relationship: ProductVariant 1:N OrderItem)

quantity.description: The number of units of the product variant included in the order.

priceAtPurchase.description: The price of the product variant at the time the order was placed, for historical and accounting accuracy.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Access is restricted to the authenticated user matching the {userId} in the path. This document is owned by the user.
Stores physical addresses associated with a user. Access is restricted to the authenticated user matching the {userId} in the path. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this address.

params.name: addressId
params.description: The unique ID of the address document.

definition.description: Contains information about product brands. This collection is publicly readable. Write access is restricted to administrative roles.

params.name: brandId
params.description: The unique ID of the brand.

definition.description: Organizes product categories. This collection is publicly readable. Write access is restricted to administrative roles.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique ID of the category.

definition.description: Lists all available products in the catalog. This collection is publicly readable. Write access is restricted to administrative roles.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique ID of the product.

definition.description: Contains specific variations (size, color, etc.) for a product. This subcollection is publicly readable. Write access is restricted to administrative roles.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent product.

params.name: productVariantId
params.description: The unique ID of the product variant.

definition.description: Represents a user's shopping cart. Access is restricted to the authenticated user matching the {userId} in the path. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this cart.

params.name: cartId
params.description: The unique ID of the cart document.

definition.description: Represents individual items within a user's shopping cart. Access is restricted to the authenticated user matching the {userId} in the path. This entity *must include a denormalized 'userId'* field for robust authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns the parent cart.

params.name: cartId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent cart.

params.name: cartItemId
params.description: The unique ID of the cart item.

definition.description: Stores a user's purchase orders. Access is restricted to the authenticated user matching the {userId} in the path. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who placed this order.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique ID of the order document.

definition.description: Represents individual items within a user's order. Access is restricted to the authenticated user matching the {userId} in the path. This entity *must include a denormalized 'userId'* field for robust authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who placed the parent order.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent order.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: The unique ID of the order item.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure for DankDrops prioritizes secure, scalable, and debuggable authorization by strictly adhering to the core design principles, especially Authorization Independence and Structural Segregation. 

**Authorization Independence via Denormalization & Path-Based Ownership (CRITICAL):**

For user-specific, private data (User Profiles, Addresses, Carts, Orders, and their respective items), the structure employs a deep hierarchical path: `/users/{userId}/<collection>/<documentId>`. Crucially, for `CartItem` and `OrderItem` entities, which are subcollections of `Cart` and `Order` respectively, the `userId` field (representing the owner) is explicitly denormalized into *each `CartItem` and `OrderItem` document*. While the provided schemas for `CartItem` and `OrderItem` do not explicitly list `userId`, it is *mandated* that `userId` be added to these document schemas. This denormalization means that any Firestore security rule for these items can verify ownership using `request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId` without needing to perform an expensive and non-atomic `get()` operation on the parent `Cart` or `Order` document. This directly addresses Authorization Independence, ensuring atomic operations and simplified rule logic.

**Structural Segregation for Homogeneous Security Posture & QAPs:**

Publicly accessible data, such as `Brands`, `Categories`, `Products`, and `ProductVariants`, are housed in top-level collections: `/brands`, `/categories`, `/products`. All documents within these collections share the same security posture: they are publicly readable by any user, while write access is restricted (e.g., to authenticated admins or server-side processes). This structural segregation ensures that `list` operations (Query Against Paths - QAPs) are inherently secure and efficient; clients can freely query these collections without requiring complex filtering logic in security rules. There's no mixing of public and private data or different access levels within the same collection, making rules clearer and easier to debug.

**Consistency and Predictability:**

Path parameters are semantically named (e.g., `{userId}`, `{productId}`). Authorization fields like `userId` are consistently used. The explicit `status` field in `Order` (e.g., 'pending', 'shipped') ensures clear state modeling. This overall design provides a highly robust foundation for DankDrops, allowing secure and performant data access while simplifying the management of Firestore security rules.
